negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_047
prompt: The video begins with a close-up shot of a robotic arm situated above an open oven in a modern kitchen setting. The oven contains a white plastic tray with a blue plate and a green apple resting on it. The oven, equipped with sleek black handles, is set against a backdrop of wooden paneling and a clean, contemporary countertop. The robotic arm, composed of metallic components and cables, is positioned at the top of the oven. The initial position of the robot arm is from above, hovering over the oven. As the video progresses, the robotic arm lifts itself out from the oven and moves smoothly to the front of the oven door. It then applies force to the oven door, closing it completely with precision. The camera follows the robotic arm's movements, capturing the seamless transition from opening to closing the oven door.
